fewShots.question: What is our overall denial rate?
fewShots.query: EVALUATE { ("Total Claims", [Total Claims]), ("Total Billed", [Total Billed]), ("Denial Rate", [Denial Rate]), ("At Risk Revenue", [At Risk Revenue]) }

fewShots.question: What is the denial rate by payer?
fewShots.query: EVALUATE SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(dim_payer[payer_name], dim_payer[payer_type], "Claims", [Total Claims], "Denial Rate", [Denial Rate], "Avg Denial Risk", [Avg Denial Risk]) ORDER BY [Denial Rate] DESC

fewShots.question: Compare collection rate across all payers.
fewShots.query: EVALUATE SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(dim_payer[payer_name], dim_payer[payer_type], "Billed", [Total Billed], "Paid", [Total Paid], "Collection %", [Collection Rate], "Net Coll %", [Net Collection Rate]) ORDER BY [Collection Rate] ASC

fewShots.question: What is our total revenue at risk?
fewShots.query: EVALUATE SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(dim_payer[payer_name], "At Risk Revenue", [At Risk Revenue], "High Risk Denials", [High Risk Denials]) ORDER BY [At Risk Revenue] DESC

fewShots.question: Show the monthly billed vs paid trend for the last 12 months.
fewShots.query: EVALUATE SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(dim_date[year], dim_date[month_number], dim_date[month_name], "Billed", [Total Billed], "Paid", [Total Paid], "Collection %", [Collection Rate], "MTD Claims", [MTD Claims]) ORDER BY dim_date[year], dim_date[month_number]

fewShots.question: Which payers are slowest to pay?
fewShots.query: EVALUATE SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(dim_payer[payer_name], dim_payer[payer_type], "Claims", [Total Claims], "Avg Days to Payment", [Avg Days to Payment], "Collection %", [Collection Rate]) ORDER BY [Avg Days to Payment] DESC

fewShots.question: What does our AR aging look like?
fewShots.query: EVALUATE SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(agg_days_in_ar[age_bucket], dim_payer[payer_name], "Claims", SUM(agg_days_in_ar[claim_count]), "Billed", SUM(agg_days_in_ar[billed_amount])) ORDER BY agg_days_in_ar[age_bucket], dim_payer[payer_name]

fewShots.question: Which payers have the best appeal ROI?
fewShots.query: EVALUATE SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(agg_appeal_outcomes[payer_name], "Appeals", SUM(agg_appeal_outcomes[appeal_count]), "Won", CALCULATE(SUM(agg_appeal_outcomes[appeal_count]), agg_appeal_outcomes[appeal_outcome] = "Won"), "Recovered", SUM(agg_appeal_outcomes[total_amount_recovered])) ORDER BY [Recovered] DESC

fewShots.question: What is our payer mix by volume and revenue?
fewShots.query: EVALUATE SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(dim_payer[payer_type], "Payers", [Total Payers], "Claims", [Total Claims], "Billed", [Total Billed], "Paid", [Total Paid], "Collection %", [Collection Rate]) ORDER BY [Total Billed] DESC

fewShots.question: Which DRGs have the worst margins?
fewShots.query: EVALUATE TOPN(15, SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(fact_encounter[drg_code], fact_encounter[drg_description], "Encounters", [Total Encounters], "Charges", [Total Charges], "Cost", [Total Cost], "Expected Reimb", [Total Expected Reimbursement]), [Total Cost], DESC)

fewShots.question: How are YTD charges trending versus prior year?
fewShots.query: EVALUATE { ("YTD Charges", [YTD Charges]), ("PY Charges", [PY Charges]), ("YoY %", [YoY Charge Growth]), ("Total Encounters", [Total Encounters]) }

fewShots.question: Which denial reasons drove the most revenue at risk last quarter?
fewShots.query: EVALUATE TOPN(10, SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(fact_claim[primary_denial_reason], "Claims", [Total Claims], "At Risk $", [At Risk Revenue], "Avg Risk", [Avg Denial Risk]), [At Risk Revenue], DESC)
